mean_checks.basis: Correct: V_avg = D*Vstep = (ton/period)*3.3 = 0.5*3.3 = 1.650V. #59 fixed oracle-first: spice.py now compensates the PULSE trapezoid ramp area (PW = ton - (TR+TF)/2) so the emitted duty equals ton/period (was 60% -> 1.98V before the fix). Window +/-3% of Vstep from the ripple/settling budget in derivation.md; unchanged from its pre-fix would_pass value.
